# Rosalind Problem: Inferring Peptide from Full Spectrum (Forth Solution)

## Problem Understanding

In this problem, we need to reconstruct a peptide sequence from its full spectrum (mass spectrum). Given a list of masses in the spectrum, we need to find the peptide that would produce this spectrum.

## Approach

1. **Mass to Amino Acid Mapping**: Create a mapping of masses to amino acids
2. **Spectrum Analysis**: Process the spectrum to identify possible peptide sequences
3. **Backtracking**: Use recursive backtracking to build valid peptide sequences

## Forth Implementation

```forth
\ Rosalind: Inferring Peptide from Full Spectrum
\ Solution in Forth

\ Constants and data structures
10000 constant MAX-SPECTRUM
1000 constant MAX-PEPTIDE
1000 constant MAX-AMINO-ACIDS

\ Global variables
create spectrum MAX-SPECTRUM cells allot
create peptide MAX-PEPTIDE chars allot
create amino-acid-map MAX-AMINO-ACIDS cells allot
create mass-map MAX-AMINO-ACIDS cells allot

\ Amino acid masses (rounded to integers)
: amino-acid-masses ( -- )
    71  128  113  114  57  129  115  101  129  113  131  114  132  115  128  114  131  128  114  113  115  114  113  114  113  114  113  114  113  114  113  114  113  114  113  114  113  114  113  114
